name: PuppyBot PGE-generated lower-body collision profile
source: PGE pge-collision 0.1.0 generated a four-box reviewed profile from models/puppybot/final2/meshes/lowerbody.gltf. Each PGE local candidate offset was then transformed through the URDF root -> lowerbody fixed joint [-0.00981731, -0.0205488, -0.0165409].

generation.reviewStatus: candidate geometry reviewed for simulator prototype only

wheelRadiusM.source: models/puppybot/final2/meshes/wheel_outer.gltf POSITION accessor radial bounds are +/-0.0324999988 m; URDF uses this mesh at scale 1.
wheelRadiusM.status: CAD nominal outer radius; verify loaded rolling radius before hardware prediction

vehicleParameters.source: Explicit RobotDreams prototype motor and vehicle assumptions mirrored by the PuppyBot dynamic-vehicle manifests; not hardware measurements.
